issue.message: Field requires API level 24 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationManager#IMPORTANCE_HIGH`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationChannel()`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationChannel#setDescription`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationChannel#setDescription`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationChannel#enableVibration`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationChannel#enableLights`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `android.app.NotificationManager#createNotificationChannel`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.app.AlarmManager#setAndAllowWhileIdle`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.app.AlarmManager#setAndAllowWhileIdle`
`android:forceDarkAllowed` requires API level 29 (current min is 21)
`android:forceDarkAllowed` requires API level 29 (current min is 21)
`android:forceDarkAllowed` requires API level 29 (current min is 21)
`android:windowLayoutInDisplayCutoutMode` requires API level 27 (current min is 21)
`android:windowLayoutInDisplayCutoutMode` requires API level 27 (current min is 21)
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 21)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 21)
